examples: The mystique surrounding the monarchy has gone for ever.
His book destroyed the mystique of monarchy.
The result of this policy of secrecy was that a kind of mystique had grown up around Swiss banking.
The question is how open-minded we can be when Caspian caviar has cornered the market on fish-egg mystique.
Part of the allure, the mystique, of roofs is that they offer a modicum of privacy.
